description: Letter from Abū l-Ḥasan b. ʿAṭiyya to his 'brother and father' Wāfī b. Ḥasan and Avraham b. Ṣedaqa. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Likely Mamluk-era. Dealing in part with an Islamic ruling/fatwā that stipulated the levying of 500 dinars from the Jews in Egypt, and sending greetings to relatives. Needs further examination. (Information in part from Goitein's hand list.)
description_he: מכתב מאבו אל-חסן בן עטייה לוואפי בן חסן ואברהם בן צדקה, על פסיקה אסלאמית להטיל 500 דינר על יהודי מצרים
